ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the resource */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the original content of the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., active, draft, archived) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the resource (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the resource */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Whether the resource is featured */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the resource has been viewed */,
  "downloads_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the resource has been downloaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Articles, Tutorials, Videos, Podcasts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon image of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, author, learner) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "is_author" INTEGER /* Whether the user has author privileges */,
  "is_learner" INTEGER /* Whether the user has learner privileges */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_resources" (
  "author_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author-resource relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource created by the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author-resource relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author-resource relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_resources_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner who provided feedback */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the learner (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment left by the learner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback was provided anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner receiving the recommendation */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner who viewed the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was viewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the view event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the view event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_views_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner who downloaded the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was downloaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the download event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the download event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_downloads_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Django, version control, Telegram bots) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon image of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_topics" (
  "resource_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-topic relationship */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource covering the topic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic covered by the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource-topic relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource-topic relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_topics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)
